sentences.target: Je lis une histoire de dragon.

translations.fr: Je lis une histoire de dragon.
translations.en: I'm reading a story about a dragon.
translations.es: Estoy leyendo un cuento sobre un dragón.
translations.de: Ich lese eine Geschichte über einen Drachen.
translations.it: Sto leggendo una storia su un drago.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在读一个关于龙的故事。
translations.yue: 我喺度睇一本關於龍嘅故事。
translations.pt: Estou lendo uma história sobre um dragão.
translations.tr: Bir ejderha hakkında bir hikâye okuyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đọc một câu chuyện về một con rồng.
translations.nl: Ik lees een verhaal over een draak.
translations.hi: मैं एक ड्रैगन के बारे में कहानी पढ़ रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Διαβάζω μια ιστορία για έναν δράκο.
translations.nb: Jeg leser en historie om en drage.
translations.id: Saya sedang membaca cerita tentang seekor naga.
translations.sv: Jag läser en berättelse om en drake.
translations.ro: Citesc o poveste despre un dragon.
translations.da: Jeg læser en historie om en drage.
translations.ja: ドラゴンについての物語を読んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; predicate of the clause.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'histoire'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the noun phrase serving as direct object.
Preposition introducing a nominal complement indicating content ('dragon').
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: Tu dessines un dragon trop mignon.

translations.fr: Tu dessines un dragon trop mignon.
translations.en: You're drawing a really cute dragon.
translations.es: Estás dibujando un dragón muy tierno.
translations.de: Du zeichnest einen richtig niedlichen Drachen.
translations.it: Stai disegnando un drago davvero carino.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在画一条超可爱的龙。
translations.yue: 你喺度畫一條好得意嘅龍。
translations.pt: Você está desenhando um dragão muito fofo.
translations.vi: Bạn đang vẽ một con rồng rất dễ thương.
translations.nl: Je tekent een erg schattige draak.
translations.hi: तुम एक बहुत प्यारा ड्रैगन बना रहे हो।
translations.nb: Du tegner en veldig søt drage.
translations.id: Kamu sedang menggambar seekor naga yang sangat lucu.
translations.sv: Du ritar en riktigt söt drake.
translations.da: Du tegner en virkelig sød drage.
translations.ja: とってもかわいいドラゴンを描いているね。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes a direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'dragon'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Adverb of degree modifying the adjective 'mignon'.
Adjective, masculine singular; post-nominal modifier of 'dragon'.

sentences.target: On voit un dragon dans le film.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ vwa œ̃ dʁa.gɔ̃ dɑ̃ lə film/

translations.fr: On voit un dragon dans le film.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ vwa œ̃ dʁa.gɔ̃ dɑ̃ lə film/
translations.en: We see a dragon in the movie.
translations.es: Vemos un dragón en la película.
translations.de: Wir sehen einen Drachen im Film.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在电影里看到一条龙。
translations.yue: 我哋喺部電影入面見到一條龍。
translations.pt: Nós vemos um dragão no filme.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thấy một con rồng trong phim.
translations.nl: We zien een draak in de film.
translations.hi: हम फिल्म में एक ड्रैगन देखते हैं।
translations.nb: Vi ser en drage i filmen.
translations.id: Kami melihat seekor naga di film.
translations.sv: Vi ser en drake i filmen.
translations.da: Vi ser en drage i filmen.
translations.ja: 映画でドラゴンを見ます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal subject pronoun (generic 'we/one'), 3rd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicate taking a direct object and a locative PP.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'dragon'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'voit'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'film'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

translations.en: My pajamas have a dragon on them.
translations.de: Auf meinem Pyjama ist ein Drache.
translations.it: Sul mio pigiama c’è un drago.
translations.vi: Trên bộ đồ ngủ của tôi có một con rồng.
translations.nl: Op mijn pyjama staat een draak.
translations.hi: मेरे पायजामे पर एक ड्रैगन है।
translations.el: Στις πιτζάμες μου υπάρχει ένας δράκος.
translations.nb: På pyjamasen min er det en drage.
translations.id: Di piyama saya ada seekor naga.
translations.sv: På min pyjamas finns en drake.
translations.ro: Pe pijamaua mea este un dragon.
translations.da: På min pyjamas er der en drage.
translations.ja: パジャマにドラゴンが描いてある。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'pyjama'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'dragon'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'a'.
